title: melothria lucida
intro: Melothria lucida, also known as the gac fruit or white gourd, is a type of vine plant that belongs to the cucumber family (Cucurbitaceae). It is native to tropical regions of Asia and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals such as calcium and iron, providing numerous health benefits such as improving eye health, boosting the immune system, and reducing inflammation. Melothria lucida is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or juice, and is also used in traditional remedies such as salves and poultices to treat skin conditions and wounds.
